tree_topic: Arts & Entertainment > Online Media > Online Image Galleries
questions: Identify the digital design and art publication that features a specific curated list titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Upon locating this publication, search its archives for a guide on mobile photography hardware. What is the exact full headline of the article that explicitly describes the devices as being 'tried and tested by a photographer'?

rounds.question: Identify the digital design and art publication that features a specific curated list titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Upon locating this publication, search its archives for a guide on mobile photography hardware. What is the exact full headline of the article that explicitly describes the devices as being 'tried and tested by a photographer'?
checklist_width: Identifies the target article headline: 'The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer'
checklist_depth: Identifies the correct publication: Creative Bloq
Validates the publication via the anchor article: 'The 17 best photography websites'
rounds.rationale: The question requires Deep Reasoning to identify the specific publication (Creative Bloq) using the unique title of one article ('The 17 best photography websites') as a fingerprint. It then demands Wide Aggregation (intra-site search) to locate a second, distinct article based on specific phrasing ('tried and tested by a photographer') and retrieve its full headline.
source_nodes: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer | Creative Bloq
rounds.meta_context_snippet: [Wide Logic - Target 0]:  [Wide Logic - Target 1]: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer | Creative Bloq Please wait...
rounds.answer_a:
The curated list "The 17 best photography websites" is featured by *Creative Bloq*, a digital design and art publication. Searching its archives for mobile photography hardware guides reveals the headline: **"The best camera phones in 2024, tried and tested by a photographer"** [1].

## References
[1] Creative Bloq. (2024). The best camera phones in 2024, tried and tested by a photographer. Retrieved from https://www.creativebloq.com/buying-guides/the-best-camera-phones
rounds.answer_b:
The exact full headline is "Mobile Photography Gear: The Tried and Tested Devices I Use Every Day as a Photographer," published by PetaPixel, a digital photography and imaging website known for curated resources and technical guides [1]. The article details specific hardware tested in real-world conditions by a professional photographer, aligning with the site's focus on practical, experience-based advice [2].

## References  
[1] https://petapixel.com  
[2] https://petapixel.com/gear/
rounds.judge_reasoning: Agent A correctly identified the publication (Creative Bloq) associated with the specific curated list mentioned in the prompt ('The 17 best photography websites'). Consequently, it found the correct target article and headline regarding camera phones being 'tried and tested'. Agent B failed the initial logic step by misidentifying the publication as PetaPixel, leading to an incorrect answer for the headline. Agent A is accurate, concise, and follows the constraints perfectly.
